phase-summary.outcome: Added reusable `combatstats` schema with default stat vectors, wired explicit inheritance for `entity.base` and `item.base`, updated schema code generation to honor explicit `extendsModelId`, renamed Feature Refs to Stats, and added per-model info popups in model tree.

file.description: Injected stat features/defaults and combatstats model normalization into runtime schema flow.

tests.test: TypeScript typecheck passes with new stat/inheritance normalization and tree info interactions.
